channel.title: TL;DR News — Daily AI Intelligence
channel.description: AI-generated daily news summaries across world, business, technology, sports, and science.

item.title: World News Summary — 2026-03-11
item.description: Countries are responding to rising oil prices and escalating violence in the West Bank amid ongoing geopolitical tensions.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-03-11
item.description: US inflation remains steady at 2.4% amid geopolitical tensions, while a significant labor strike in the meatpacking industry looms.

item.title: Technology News Summary — 2026-03-11
item.description: AI technology continues to raise concerns over privacy and safety, as evidenced by recent developments in job interviews and chatbot interactions with teens.

item.title: Sports News Summary — 2026-03-11
item.description: The U.S. baseball team faces elimination after a shocking loss to Italy in the World Baseball Classic, while NFL free agency sees significant player movements.

item.title: Science News Summary — 2026-03-11
item.description: Recent scientific discoveries range from ancient asteroid impacts to breakthroughs in cancer treatment and crop yield enhancement.
